JUDGE LABOWITZ C/C FOR TRIAL BY CT. ALL PRESENT. DEFTS IN PRO PER. WITNESSES SWORN & EXAMINED. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED & ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. ARGUMENTS BY ALL PARTIES. CASE SUBMITTED. CASE SUBMITTED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SHAW, PETER YASINITSKY, JENNY $3,667.22 PRINCIPAL, $228.75 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,895.97, JUDGMENT IN THE SHAW X-COMPLT IS AWARDED TO X-DEFT YASINITS KY.JUDGMENT IN THE YASINITSKY X-COMPLT IS AWARDED TO X-COMPL YASINITSKY AGAINST X-DEFT PETER SHAW. MR. SHAW SHALL BE LIA BLE FOR ANY FUTURE SUMS PAID BY YASINITSKY TO PLTF. UP TO $3,667.22 PLUS $228.75 COSTS, AWARDED TO PLTF.
